zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：震荡偏强整理
zh.content:
当前SOL/USD价格在85.8附近窄幅整理，整体呈现低波动震荡格局，但价格稳站20日均线上方，短线多头结构仍在维持，市场进入整理蓄势阶段。

MACD指标显示微弱正值0.185，动能略有增强但未形成强趋势，均线系统中价格位于SMA20之上，短期偏多但缺乏明显放量配合，RSI缺失使动量判断略受限制。

下方支撑关注85.70与85.50区域，若跌破可能回测更低震荡区间；上方阻力集中在86.20及86.30附近，突破需成交量配合确认短线趋势延续。

操作上建议保持区间思路，高抛低吸为主，未突破86.30前避免追涨，若回踩85.50附近可分批布局多单，严格设置止损以控制波动风险。

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Solana is trading in a narrowly compressed range around 85.86, reflecting short-term consolidation after recent directional movement. The modest 24-hour decline of 0.23% suggests sellers retain slight control, although the limited spread between the daily high and low indicates volatility is currently subdued. Price action remains marginally above the 20-period simple moving average at 85.71, which points to a mildly constructive near-term structure. Maintaining position above this average could support gradual bullish continuation.

Momentum indicators present a cautiously optimistic outlook despite incomplete data. The MACD reading remains positive at 0.185, implying underlying bullish momentum is still active, even if strength appears limited. Without a confirmed signal line or RSI value, traders should avoid overcommitting to directional assumptions. Still, the positive MACD suggests buyers have not fully exited the market. If momentum expands alongside stronger volume, Solana may attempt a breakout beyond immediate resistance near 86.20 and potentially extend toward the 87.00 region.

From a technical perspective, immediate support is forming around 85.70, closely aligned with the SMA(20), while stronger downside protection appears near 85.30. A breakdown below these levels could accelerate short-term selling pressure and expose the market to a retracement toward 84.50. On the upside, resistance remains concentrated between 86.20 and 86.50, where recent intraday advances have stalled. A decisive move above this zone would improve bullish sentiment and likely attract momentum-based buyers into the market.

Traders may consider a cautious range-trading approach until volatility expands and clearer momentum signals emerge. Short-term bullish positions become more attractive on sustained closes above 86.20 with rising participation, while tighter stop-loss management remains important given the current compressed structure. Conservative traders may prefer waiting for confirmation before entering new positions. Conversely, failure to hold above the moving average could create opportunities for short-term bearish trades targeting lower support zones.
